paragraphs: Open packs of real graded cards, own them instantly, and ship to your door or sell on the marketplace.
From purchase to ownership in three simple steps.
Choose from Pokemon, One Piece, sports, and more. Every pack contains a random graded card with live odds and provably fair pulls powered by public VRF.
View all packs
Browse every category and rip
Tap to reveal what you pulled. Every card is real, vaulted by PSA, Fanatics, and Alt, and fully insured from the moment you own it.

Don't like your pull? Sell it back instantly
Hold your card in the vault, flip it on the marketplace, trade with collectors, or redeem and we'll ship the physical slab to your door.

Everything you need to collect, compete, and trade
Hundreds of packs across Pokemon, sports, TCG, and more. New drops every week.
Buy and sell cards with other collectors. Real cards, real ownership, instant transfers.
Pack Party, Duel, Draft. Compete with friends and other collectors for real cards.
Earn points on every purchase. Top collectors win weekly prizes and exclusive rewards.
Everything you need to know before you rip.

Yes. Every card on Phygitals is a real, professionally graded physical card stored in secure vault facilities. When you open a pack, you receive ownership of a specific physical slab that exists in a PSA, Fanatics, or Alt vault. You can ship it to your door at any time.

When you request a shipment, your card is pulled from the vault, carefully packaged, and shipped via fully tracked and insured delivery. We ship worldwide, and most domestic orders arrive within 5-7 business days. International shipping typically takes 10-14 days.
You can sell any card back instantly for 85-90% of its market value, or list it on the marketplace at your own price. Many collectors also trade cards with each other directly on the platform.

Every pull is determined by a provably fair system using public VRF (Verifiable Random Function). The odds for each pack are published transparently, and every result can be independently verified on-chain. No one, including us, can influence the outcome.

Cards are stored in climate-controlled, fully insured vault facilities operated by PSA, Fanatics, and Alt. These are the same facilities used by major auction houses and institutional collectors. Your cards are protected around the clock.

Absolutely. You can list any card on the Phygitals marketplace and set your own price. When it sells, funds are available immediately. You can also use the instant sell-back feature for a guaranteed payout at 85-90% of market value.
Join 100,000+ collectors opening packs and trading real cards every day.
Discover the world's first Pokémon marketplace where digitized cards can be bought, sold, traded, vaulted, and earn income, instantaneously, all in one seamless platform.
Follow us on social media for the latest updates, exclusive offers, and community highlights.
